name: secure-bucket
description: A Pulumi component for creating secure, encrypted S3 buckets with KMS, versioning, and TLS-only access. Created by Daniel Perlovsky.

pulumi:secure-bucket:SecureBucket.description: Creates an encrypted S3 bucket with KMS encryption, versioning, public access blocking, and a TLS-only bucket policy.

customerName.description: The customer name used for bucket naming and tagging.

owner.description: The owner ARN for tagging. Defaults to the caller's IAM ARN.

tags.description: Additional tags to apply to all resources.

kmsKeyArn.description: An existing KMS key ARN. If omitted, a new KMS key is created with automatic rotation.

environment.description: Deployment environment for tagging. Defaults to 'production'.

projectName.description: Project name used for resource naming and tagging.

allowedRegions.description: Allowed AWS regions. Deployment fails if the current region is not in this list.

bucketName.description: The name of the S3 bucket.

bucketArn.description: The ARN of the S3 bucket.

bucketId.description: The ID of the S3 bucket.

kmsKeyArn.description: The ARN of the KMS key.

kmsKeyId.description: The ID of the KMS key.
